able to use AI tools effectively across product tasks — prompt well, validate output, integrate AI into daily workflow.
Fluent in Vietnamese
(clear, concise, and persuasive communication)
and
Professional working proficiency in English.
Stakeholder management with senior leaders:
comfortable working directly with BOD and Heads of other departments — align competing priorities, manage expectations proactively, and communicate with executive-level clarity.
Proficiency in writing user stories, acceptance criteria, and creating workflow diagrams (AI-assisted is fine and encouraged).
Comfortable running demos, UAT sessions, and stakeholder presentations.
SQL and basic data-analysis skills are a plus.
ABILITIES
Strong self-management:
organized, proactive, and drives tasks to completion without constant supervision.
Manages people without authority:
coordinates, influences, and unblocks teammates across functions.
Owner mindset:
takes responsibility from idea to operation — not just hand-off at delivery.

calm under pressure, honest about trade-offs, and able to say no constructively.

embraces new technology (especially AI) and continuously sharpens the craft.

We are looking for a  Product Tester who is passionate about building reliable, high-quality digital products — not just executing test cases. You will play a key role in ensuring that every feature delivered by the Product team works smoothly, performs consistently, and creates a seamless experience for families using TeenCare AI.
You will work closely with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineers throughout the product lifecycle — from understanding requirements and designing test scenarios to validating new releases before they reach real users.
If you enjoy finding edge cases, thinking critically about user experience, and improving product quality through structured testing and collaboration, this role is for you.
ABOUT TEENCARE AI
At TeenCare AI, we work at the intersection of education, family, and technology. Each week, teens work with dedicated 1:1 mentors. These sessions generate meaningful behavioral insights that help parents better understand and support their children.
We combine human mentorship with technology to create tools that help families make better decisions in everyday life. Our platform is already supporting families across Southeast Asia, and we are building toward a system that can scale globally.

Ensure product quality across the platform
Create and maintain detailed test cases, test plans, and testing documentation

Validate product requirements and user flows before release
Collaborate closely with the Product team
Work alongside Product Managers and Engineers to understand business logic and feature expectations
Participate in requirement discussions, sprint planning, and product reviews
Provide feedback on usability, edge cases, and product consistency from a user perspective
Support UAT processes and release validation
Improve testing processes and quality standards
Contribute to improving QA workflows, test coverage, and release processes
Help define testing standards and best practices within the team
Support automation testing initiatives where applicable
Monitor product stability and proactively identify potential risks before deployment
Experiment and improve
Explore new testing approaches, QA tools, and automation opportunities
Continuously improve testing efficiency and reporting quality
Stay updated on product quality trends and testing methodologies
TESTING STACK & ENGINEERING EXPECTATIONS
Testing & QA
Manual Testing
Functional Testing
Regression Testing
Integration Testing
Exploratory Testing
User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
Tools & Collaboration
Jira / Trello / ClickUp
Postman
Chrome DevTools
TestRail or similar QA management tools
Technical Knowledge
Basic understanding of APIs and client-server architecture
Familiarity with databases and data validation
Understanding of SDLC and Agile/Scrum workflows
Basic automation testing knowledge is a plus
Collaborative Stack
Node.js
PostgreSQL
MongoDB
Redis

1–2 years of experience in software testing or QA roles (project experience is acceptable for junior candidates)

Ability to write clear bug reports and testing documentation
Familiarity with web/mobile application testing
Basic understanding of APIs, databases, and product workflows
Mindset
Curious and proactive — you naturally explore edge cases and ask thoughtful questions
Strong ownership — you follow issues through until resolution
Collaborative by default — you communicate clearly with Product and Engineering teams

job_description:
1. Quản lý dự án end-to-end
Lập kế hoạch tổng thể, tổ chức triển khai và quản lý dự án từ khởi động đến khi Go-live và bàn giao vận hành.
Theo dõi, kiểm soát tiến độ, phạm vi, ngân sách và đảm bảo dự án đạt được mục tiêu chất lượng đề ra.
Xác định tiêu chí Go-live, tổ chức nghiệm thu, bàn giao và đào tạo đội ngũ vận hành.
Chủ động xử lý các vấn đề phát sinh, đề xuất điều chỉnh kế hoạch khi cần thiết để đảm bảo mục tiêu dự án.
2. Quản lý phạm vi và yêu cầu thay đổi
Xác định, thống nhất và kiểm soát phạm vi công việc của dự án.
Quản lý các yêu cầu thay đổi (Change Request), đánh giá tác động về tiến độ, chi phí và chất lượng trước khi trình phê duyệt.
Đảm bảo sự nhất quán giữa phạm vi, mục tiêu và kết quả đầu ra của dự án.
3. Quản lý tiến độ, chất lượng và hiệu quả thực thi
Xây dựng kế hoạch chi tiết, quản lý task/backlog và điều phối nguồn lực phù hợp.
Tổ chức dự án theo mô hình Agile/Scrum (khi áp dụng), phối hợp chặt chẽ với Product Owner trong việc xây dựng roadmap và lộ trình triển khai giải pháp.
Theo dõi, cập nhật và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ hoặc đột xuất theo yêu cầu của các cấp quản lý.
Kiểm soát chất lượng các deliverables, kịp thời đưa ra biện pháp khắc phục khi phát sinh sai lệch.
4. Quản lý rủi ro và vấn đề
Nhận diện, đánh giá và dự báo các rủi ro tiềm ẩn của dự án.
Xây dựng phương án giảm thiểu, kế hoạch dự phòng và theo dõi việc thực hiện.
Chủ động giải quyết các vấn đề phát sinh; trường hợp vượt thẩm quyền, kịp thời báo cáo và đề xuất phương án lên cấp lãnh đạo cao hơn.
5. Giao tiếp, phối hợp và quản lý các bên liên quan
Đóng vai trò cầu nối giữa các bên liên quan (Nghiệp vụ, CNTT, Đối tác…).
Lập kế hoạch truyền thông, yêu cầu và phân bổ nguồn lực phù hợp cho từng giai đoạn dự án.
Giải quyết xung đột, đảm bảo sự phối hợp nhịp nhàng giữa các đơn vị.
Chuẩn bị và hoàn thiện các hồ sơ, tài liệu dự án theo quy định.
6. Kỹ năng lãnh đạo và phát triển đội ngũ
Gắn kết và tạo động lực cho các thành viên trong team dự án.
Hỗ trợ, định hướng và tháo gỡ khó khăn để các thành viên hoàn thành nhiệm vụ được giao.
Xây dựng môi trường làm việc chủ động, trách nhiệm và hướng đến kết quả.

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior Project Manager who can operate independently from day one - owning delivery contracts, evaluating and giving feedback on technical resources, and executing end-to-end delivery across complex fintech engagements. This is not a coordination or reporting role. You will be expected to assess engineering estimation, challenge scope, and make commercially sound decisions in a financial services context.

Client-first mindset with strong commercial judgment
Comfortable making decisions in ambiguous situations
Strong prioritization and escalation skills
Pragmatic, negotiation-oriented, and detail-focused
Able to balance relationship management with delivery discipline

Successfully hand over and stabilize delivery for at least 1 large integration project with agreed timeline and quality expectations
Drive vendor negotiations that help reduce client cost or secure additional support, with clear documentation of outcome
Keep scope creep caused by missed requirements to below 5%
Maintain positive client satisfaction results in line with target CSAT

required_skills: Project Management, English, Business Analysis, IT Governance
job_description:
Project Planning & Governance
Develop and maintain the overall project plan, covering scope, timeline, milestones, dependencies, resources, budget assumptions and key delivery risks.
Define and drive project governance structure, working model, meeting cadence, reporting mechanism and escalation path across all key stakeholders.
Ensure project objectives, scope boundaries, priorities and success criteria are clearly aligned and consistently understood by all involved parties.
Establish and maintain project control artefacts such as RAID log, issue log, action log, decision log and change request tracker.
Monitor project execution against approved baselines and proactively identify deviations, impact and corrective actions.
Drive milestone-based planning and stage readiness for key phases such as requirement sign-off, design completion, SIT, UAT, migration, cutover and go-live.
Ensure the project is delivered in compliance with internal governance, risk, architecture, security and release management standards of the Bank.
Stakeholder & Vendor Management
Act as the central coordination point among Business, Product, IT, Operations, PMO and implementation partners/vendors.
Manage communication with senior stakeholders and provide timely project updates on status, risks, issues, dependencies and decisions required.
Drive alignment across internal teams and vendors on project scope, delivery sequence, assumptions, responsibilities and timelines.
Manage vendor delivery commitments, key dependencies, issue escalation and follow-up to ensure external parties deliver as planned.
Facilitate project forums, working sessions and steering meetings to support timely decision-making and issue resolution.
Manage stakeholder expectations in a complex delivery environment with evolving requirements, multiple dependencies and varying team maturity levels.
Delivery Oversight & Control
Coordinate end-to-end delivery activities across requirement clarification, solution alignment, build, integration, testing, migration, deployment and post go-live support.
Closely manage dependencies between the vendor platform and the Bank’s legacy/internal systems, including interfaces, APIs, data mapping, environment readiness and operational impacts.
Track and control scope changes, ensuring impact on timeline, cost, quality and resources is properly assessed before approval.
Drive risk identification, mitigation planning and escalation for critical project risks, especially those related to integration, unclear requirements, delayed dependencies and vendor performance.
Work closely with Business and Technology teams to ensure testing strategy, business readiness, operational readiness and cutover readiness are well prepared.
Ensure key project deliverables such as BRD/FRD, project plans, test plans, migration plans, cutover checklists and status reports are completed with appropriate quality and control.
Support release planning and go-live command activities to ensure a controlled and stable production launch.
Team Coordination & Ways of Working
Coordinate cross-functional teams and workstream leads to ensure actions are executed on time and project momentum is maintained.
Bring structure and discipline to teams with low project delivery maturity by clarifying roles, ownership, expectations and follow-up mechanisms.
Apply practical Agile best practices where appropriate, such as regular sync-ups, backlog reviews, dependency reviews, demos and retrospectives, while maintaining strong control through milestone-based delivery.
Resolve project conflicts, blockers and cross-team issues in a timely and constructive manner.
Drive accountability and continuous improvement in project execution by identifying recurring pain points and improving project ways of working.

between our AI/prompt quality team in the Philippines and our software development team in Vietnam. You will build, lead, and scale our QC function as we grow. You will define what quality means at Template.net and make sure the entire team lives by that standard.
If you are someone who points fingers when things go wrong, this role is not for you. If you are someone wh
o owns the problem, finds the solution, and drives it to resolution
— we want to talk to you.
1. End-to-End Quality Ownership
Own the
full quality pipeline
from AI prompt input to final editor output

or
software/editor performance

intersection

of 20+ engineers

Build QC frameworks for
AI output quality
— accuracy, relevance, consistency, and prompt reliability
Build QC frameworks for
technical/software quality
— editor functionality, rendering, performance, cross-device and cross-browser behavior, file export formats
Create and maintain a
master quality benchmark
for every editor type (document, design, image, video)
Define what "done" and "quality" means for every feature released
5. Integration and Intersection Testing
Design and own
integration testing
— testing the full flow end to end: prompt → AI output → editor → final deliverable

bug tracking system
— ensure all issues are clearly documented, prioritized, and resolved

Why join Offspring?
Offspring is a boutique digital production studio, founded by an Australian Technical Director, that works with Australian and US markets.
We believe that having the best people is more important than having hundreds of people. We believe that work should be about culture, growth and passion… not only money. We believe in pushing people to learn and achieve more. We believe in rewarding people based on their contributions, not who they know.
If your values match with ours, then we want to talk to you.

Đôi nét về Offspring
Offspring Digital là công ty công nghệ của Úc, đã hoạt động ở Hà Nội, Việt Nam gần 10 năm. Hiện công ty có hai đối tượng khách hàng chính: Úc và Mỹ. Về mặt sản phẩm, công ty hiện xây dựng và vận hành các nền tảng social network, thương mại điện tử, ứng dụng liên quan đến sức khỏe trên cả môi trường web và mobile.
Với Offspring, chúng tôi tin rằng việc lựa chọn người có năng lực cao quan trọng hơn việc có nhiều người khả năng trung bình. Chúng tôi cũng cho rằng một công việc tốt không chỉ liên quan đến vấn đề bạn nhận được bao nhiêu lương, mà còn là môi trường làm việc, văn hóa công ty, triển vọng nghề nghiệp và đam mê. Offspring tin tưởng là môi trường có thể đáp ứng được những yêu cầu trên và là nơi tạo ra nhiều cơ hội cho mọi người học hỏi và đạt được nhiều thành tựu trong sự nghiệp của mình. Bên cạnh đó, Offspring luôn tin tưởng vào việc đánh giá nhân viên của mình dựa vào giá trị đóng góp của họ, chứ không dựa vào những mối quan hệ mà họ có.
Nếu bạn cảm thấy những giá trị của bạn phù hợp, xin chào đón bạn vào Offspring Digital!

location: HCM City, Tan Thuan, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Information Security, Networking, Security, English, Cisco
job_description:
About Safetrust
Safetrust is building the future of identity.
Imagine a world where your phone, wearable, or digital credential becomes your secure key—unlocking buildings, systems, and experiences seamlessly across physical and digital environments.
That’s what we do.
Our platform combines IoT devices, mobile credentials, and cloud-native architecture to power secure access for Fortune 200 companies and global enterprises.
As we evolve from a hardware-centric model to a platform and services-driven business, marketing plays a critical role in shaping how the market understands—and adopts—Safetrust.
About the role
The Security & Network Engineer is responsible for the design, deployment, and ongoing operation of the network and security infrastructure across Safetrust's Vietnam sites. This includes the Q7 factory deployment, which features Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, Catalyst switching, and a layered network architecture supporting both office and manufacturing environments.
This role works closely with the IT Operations & Access Management Manager, the Global IT Admin, and the Security & Compliance team to ensure the local environment meets Safetrust's global security standards, including alignment with NIST and other compliance frameworks.
Key Responsibilities
Network Engineering & Operations
Design, deploy, and maintain Cisco switching infrastructure across Vietnam sites, including core, distribution, and access layers.
Configure, harden, and operate Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, including high-availability pair configuration where applicable.
Plan and implement VLAN segmentation, routing, VPN connectivity to the US headquarters, and secure remote access for employees.
Monitor network performance and capacity, troubleshoot incidents, and lead root-cause analysis for network and connectivity issues.
Maintain accurate, version-controlled configuration backups and network diagrams.
Security & Compliance
Implement and maintain firewall rules, access policies, intrusion prevention, and content filtering aligned with Safetrust security standards.
Support the Security & Compliance team in NIST-aligned controls, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
Participate in incident response activities for network and security events.
Review and harden configurations on switches, firewalls, and access points before they are placed into production.
Collaboration & Documentation
Work with the Global IT Admin and counterparts in other regions to ensure consistent network standards across Safetrust locations.
Produce clear technical documentation, including network designs, runbooks, and standard operating procedures.
Contribute network and security asset records into the IT Asset Management (ITAM) framework and CMDB.
Coordinate with vendors and local Cisco partners on procurement, support contracts, and complex deployments.
Wireless and emerging needs
Plan and deploy enterprise wireless infrastructure to support office, factory, and guest networks.
Support the integration of Safetrust's own access management products into the corporate environment where applicable.
requirement:
Skills & Experience
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Network Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
4+ years of hands-on experience administering enterprise network infrastructure, with strong Cisco focus.
Demonstrated experience with Cisco firewall platforms — Firepower (FTD/FMC), ASA, or equivalent next-generation firewall technology.
Solid working knowledge of Cisco Catalyst switching, including VLAN, trunking, spanning tree, link aggregation, and inter-VLAN routing.
Experience with site-to-site VPN, remote access VPN, and secure connectivity between distributed offices.
Strong understanding of TCP/IP, routing protocols, DHCP, DNS, NAT, and network security fundamentals.
Working English communication skills, both written and verbal, sufficient for collaboration with the US headquarters and other regional teams.
Success Profile
The ideal candidate:
Brings a measured and methodical approach to changes in production environments, prioritizing thoughtful design and thorough review over rushed deployments.
Is comfortable raising concerns about scope, risk, or readiness, and proactively offer constructive, solution-oriented alternatives.
Demonstrates strong written documentation practices, ensuring clarity, consistency, and knowledge sharing across the team.
Is collaborative and willing to mentor and support  junior team members.
Is highly self-sufficient, able to work independently across time zones with minimal oversight while maintaining alignment with team priorities.

That’s year one. If career growth is important to you, we not only know how to help you with that, it’s what we love to do:

AI-Powered Takeoff
is an intelligent construction TakeOff platform designed to automate material quantity takeoffs from architectural and engineering drawings. By leveraging computer vision, machine learning, and the system extracts, measures, and categorizes building components directly from digital blueprints PDF, significantly reducing manual effort, errors, and turnaround time.

Automate quantity detection from drawings
Assist with measurements (length, area, count, volume)
Organize extracted quantities in structured formats
Support revision comparison
Reduce manual tracing effort

required_skills: Java, AI, Golang, Microservices, Kafka, SQL
job_description:
At LeapXpert, we're revolutionizing business communication by seamlessly integrating the familiarity of consumer messaging apps with enterprise-grade security and compliance.
As pioneers in responsible business communications, we empower employees and clients to connect through their preferred messaging platforms while upholding the highest standards of governance and security.
Our mission is to transform workplace communication globally.
We've been recognized as a Visionary in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications
Governance and Archiving Solutions, raised a $20 million Series B funding round - bringing our total funding to $60 million, and earned the trust of top-tier institutions worldwide, who rely on our platform daily to streamline client communications.
This is just the beginning - we're growing rapidly, and we're seeking passionate, talented individuals to join our team.
This is your opportunity to work on impactful projects using cutting-edge technologies alongside driven innovators from around the world.
Apply now to be part of something revolutionary!
Why join us
Innovative Culture: Work at the cutting edge of business communication technology, with a product that’s changing the way Fortune 500 companies communicate.
Impactful Work: Your contributions will directly impact how millions of professionalsconnect and collaborate worldwide.
Global Team: Be part of a diverse, mission-driven team that values collaboration, innovation, and growth.
Growth Opportunities: With our rapid expansion, there are plenty of opportunities for professional growth and development.
Award-Winning Product: Join a company with a track record of success and recognition, including accolades like being named a Gartner Cool Vendor.
About the role
Title: Senior Software Engineer (BE)
Function: Backend
Reporting: Backend Lead
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
What you’ll do
Design, document, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable Java or Go services
Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications
Identify bottlenecks and defects, and devise solutions to these problems
Translate application User Stories and use-cases into functional applications
Help to maintain code quality, organization, and automatization
requirement:
5+ years of work experience as a Backend Engineer.
Familiar with Agile development processes
Good English communication, documentation and research skills.
Strong in at least one programming language (prefer Java or Go). Flexible in learning any new languages suitable for the job.
Good understanding of OOP and Design Pattern.
Micro-service development using Spring or based on AKKA and gRPC.
Message queue: Kafka, RabbitMQ.
Experience with popular search engine frameworks: ElasticSearch, SOLR.
DB skills (SQL/NoSQL): Performance optimization.
Non-Blocking IO, Asynchronous processing.
Experience with Kubernetes (big plus).
Testing: TDD, BDD (big plus)
Familiar with Cloud providers such as AWS, GCP, and Azure
Familiar with using and understanding the macOS system and terminal.
Spearheaded and mindset.

location: 268 Trần Hưng Đạo, Phường Chợ Lớn, TP. Hồ Chí Minh, Cho Lon, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Business Analysis, Agile, Figma, Generative AI, LLM, English
job_description:
Tại ExcelTech, Senior BA không chỉ là cầu nối mà còn là
đối tác chiến lược
của khách hàng. Bạn sẽ làm việc trực tiếp với ban lãnh đạo doanh nghiệp (trong các lĩnh vực nông nghiệp, y tế, sản xuất, bán lẻ…) để thấu hiểu tận gốc bài toán nghiệp vụ, từ đó kiến tạo các giải pháp công nghệ mang lại giá trị thực tiễn và có thể đo lường được.

Chúng tôi tập trung vào các dự án trọng điểm với cam kết chất lượng tuyệt đối. Do đó, năng lực phân tích và tư duy giải pháp của bạn ở giai đoạn đầu rất quan trọng đối với sự thành bại của dự án. Một Senior BA xuất sắc sẽ là nhân tố then chốt giúp ExcelTech giữ vững và mở rộng vị thế tiên phong trong lĩnh vực giải pháp công nghệ cho doanh nghiệp trong khu vực.
requirement:
1. Khám phá & Thẩm định Tiềm năng Ứng dụng
Chủ trì Discovery Workshop:
Trực tiếp dẫn dắt các phiên làm việc chiến lược với C-suite (CDO, CTO, CIO) của khách hàng. Chủ động nhận diện và khai phá các quy trình có thể được tối ưu hóa bằng công nghệ, vượt ra khỏi việc "ghi chép yêu cầu" thuần túy để thực sự tư vấn giải pháp.
Thẩm định toàn diện:
Phân tích và đánh giá từng Use case dựa trên 4 trụ cột: Giá trị kinh doanh tiềm năng, Mức độ sẵn sàng của dữ liệu (Data readiness), Tính khả thi công nghệ và Độ phức tạp khi thay đổi hệ thống (Change management).
Lượng hóa giá trị kinh doanh:
Đưa ra các con số thuyết phục về thời gian tiết kiệm, chi phí cắt giảm, doanh thu tăng trưởng và rủi ro giảm thiểu – kèm theo các chỉ số dữ liệu cụ thể để thuyết phục khách hàng.
Xây dựng bài toán đầu tư:
Lập bảng tính ROI (ROI Calculator) và Business Case cho từng Use case; tự tin bảo vệ đề xuất trước ban lãnh đạo cấp cao của khách hàng, đối tác.
Hoạch định Lộ trình:
Đề xuất chiến lược triển khai hiệu quả, cân bằng giữa những thắng lợi ngắn hạn (Quick wins: 3-6 tháng) và các mục tiêu chiến lược dài hạn (Strategic bets: 12-18 tháng).
2. Phân tích Yêu cầu & Thiết kế Giải pháp
Tài liệu chuẩn Enterprise:
Xây dựng tài liệu Yêu cầu Kinh doanh (BRD) chất lượng cao, không chỉ dừng ở đặc tả chức năng (Functional specs) mà phải bao hàm bối cảnh nghiệp vụ, các tiêu chí thành công (Success metrics) và đánh giá rủi ro.
Chuẩn hóa yêu cầu:
Viết user stories với acceptance criteria theo tiêu chuẩn SMART và phân loại mức độ ưu tiên theo nguyên tắc INVEST. Quản lý và duy trì chặt chẽ Ma trận Truy xuất Yêu cầu (RTM).
Tối ưu giải pháp:
Phối hợp sát sao với Solution Architect để đảm bảo giải pháp giải quyết đúng "nỗi đau" của doanh nghiệp.
Trực quan hóa:
Trực tiếp thiết kế Prototype/Mockup (qua Figma, v0…) giúp khách hàng hình dung rõ nét về giải pháp trước khi code, giảm thiểu rủi ro ngay từ giai đoạn sớm (De-risk early).
Kiểm soát lợi nhuận l
à chốt chặn cuối cùng, chịu trách nhiệm chốt nghiệm thu phạm vi yêu cầu với khách hàng trước khi chuyển giao cho Development, đồng thời bảo vệ biên lợi nhuận của dự án.
3. Am hiểu Nghiệp vụ & Tư vấn Chuyên ngành
Chuyên gia theo ngành:
Sở hữu chuyên môn sâu sắc trong 1-2 lĩnh vực trọng điểm: Nông nghiệp, Y tế, Sản xuất, Bán lẻ/E-commerce.
Cập nhật kiến thức vĩ mô:
Liên tục nắm bắt các khung pháp lý (Basel III, HIPAA, GDPR…), xu hướng thị trường, đối thủ cạnh tranh và best practices để đưa ra những lời khuyên sắc bén nhất.
Dẫn dắt Tư tưởng:
Đóng góp xây dựng và xuất bản các case study, bài viết chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực chuyên môn. Đại diện ExcelTech tham gia các sự kiện ngành, hội thảo chuyên gia.
Đào tạo nội bộ:
Dẫn dắt và chuyển giao kiến thức nghiệp vụ cho đội ngũ nội bộ, hướng tới việc xây dựng các Business Unit của ExcelTech trở thành những "Vertical Experts" thay vì chỉ là Generalists.
4. Làm chủ Công nghệ & Trí tuệ Nhân tạo
Chuyên gia Kỹ nghệ:
Không chỉ dừng lại ở việc sử dụng AI cơ bản, ứng viên cần có khả năng thiết kế các prompt phức tạp trên các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLMs) hàng đầu như
Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT
. Ứng dụng LLM để xử lý dữ liệu phi cấu trúc, bóc tách insight từ tài liệu ngành, và tăng tốc độ viết các tài liệu phức tạp (BRD, User Stories).
Trực quan hóa với Generative AI:
Tiên phong trong việc ứng dụng các công cụ thiết kế tích hợp AI (như
Figma AI, v0.dev
) để tạo wireframe, mockup và biến ý tưởng thành giao diện trực quan với tốc độ thần tốc, giúp khách hàng "chạm" vào giải pháp ngay từ khâu ý tưởng.
Tự động hóa & Khung tác tử AI:
Có tư duy hệ thống và hiểu biết về cách ứng dụng các framework AI Agents hoặc các công cụ tự động hóa luồng công việc. Nhạy bén trong việc đề xuất tích hợp AI để giải phóng sức lao động cho cả quy trình nội bộ lẫn hệ thống của khách hàng.
Quản trị Tri thức & Hiệu suất:
Thành thạo việc xây dựng không gian làm việc, kết nối hệ thống tài liệu và quản lý dự án bằng các nền tảng số hiện đại có trợ lực AI (như
ClickUp, Obsidian
, Notion AI), đảm bảo thông tin dự án luôn minh bạch và dễ dàng truy xuất xuyên suốt vòng đời phát triển.
Cập nhật hệ sinh thái công nghệ:
Có đam mê thử nghiệm các công cụ AI mới. Hiểu được ranh giới giữa những gì AI "có thể làm tốt ngay lúc này" và "những rủi ro tiềm ẩn" để tư vấn giải pháp an toàn, khả thi nhất cho doanh nghiệp.

company: Công ty TNHH Thực Phẩm NFC
location: Tầng 5, Tòa nhà SCIC Trương Định, phường Xuân Hòa, Ho Chi Minh - Đường số 8, KCN Nhơn Trạch 1, Nhon Trach, Dong Nai
required_skills: Business Analysis, Oracle, SAP, Odoo, ERP
job_description:
Senior BA chịu trách nhiệm chủ động khám phá nhu cầu thực tế từ các phòng ban, từ đó thiết kế các tính năng (Features) tối ưu để giải quyết bài toán vận hành. BA là “kiến trúc sư” về mặt nghiệp vụ, đảm bảo tính năng hệ thống không chỉ đúng yêu cầu mà còn có thứ tự ưu tiên hợp lý và đạt chuẩn chất lượng trước khi bàn giao cho người dùng.
A. Khám phá Nhu cầu & Thiết kế Tính năng (Requirement Engineering)
Tìm hiểu thực tế: Chủ động làm việc sâu sát với các bộ phận (Kế hoạch, Kho, Sản xuất, QA…) tại cả Văn phòng và Nhà máy để bóc tách nhu cầu thực tế và các “điểm nghẽn” trong dòng chảy hàng hóa.
Feature Requirement: Trực tiếp tạo các tài liệu yêu cầu tính năng (Feature Requirements) chi tiết, đảm bảo giải pháp đưa ra thỏa mãn tối đa nghiệp vụ đặc thù của NFC.
Tính toán Ưu tiên: Đánh giá mức độ quan trọng và cấp thiết của từng yêu cầu để đưa ra thứ tự ưu tiên triển khai, tối ưu hóa lộ trình dự án.
B. Chuẩn hóa Blueprint & Dữ liệu chủ (Master Data)
Thiết lập Blueprint nghiệp vụ cho Chuỗi cung ứng (SCM): MRP – Mua hàng – Kho – Sản xuất – QA.
Hỗ trợ việc Chuẩn hóa Master Data: Quy tắc mã SKU, BOM đa cấp, mã lô (Lot) và quy trình truy xuất nguồn gốc (Traceability).
Xây dựng bộ tài liệu quy trình và luồng trao đổi dữ liệu chính thức giữa các phòng ban.
C. Quản trị Chất lượng & Chuyển giao (Testing & Training)
Acceptance Test Cases: Xây dựng các kịch bản kiểm thử chấp nhận (Acceptance Test Cases) làm tiêu chuẩn để nghiệm thu tính năng từ đội ngũ Developer/Vendor.
Kiểm thử hệ thống: Trực tiếp thực hiện kiểm thử để xác nhận tính năng đã hoàn thiện và hoạt động đúng như mong đợi của Business.
Huấn luyện thực chiến: Phối hợp cùng Developer thực hiện đào tạo, hướng dẫn và hỗ trợ người dùng cuối sử dụng hệ thống một cách kỷ luật.
requirement:
Kinh nghiệm: Tối thiểu 3 năm làm BA dự án ERP. Đã từng làm việc trên ít nhất một hệ thống ERP bất kỳ (Odoo, SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics…). Ưu tiên kinh nghiệm trong ngành F&B hoặc sản xuất.
Tư duy nghiệp vụ: Am hiểu về quản trị sản xuất, tồn kho (FEFO), MRP và quản lý chất lượng.
Kỹ năng phân tích: Khả năng chuyển hóa nhu cầu phức tạp thành các tính năng đơn giản, hiệu quả. Tư duy logic tốt.
Thái độ: Tư duy chủ động (Proactive), giao tiếp khéo léo.

company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
location: The Hallmark Building, 15 Tran Bach Dang Street, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Business Analysis, Jira, Agile, BPMN, API, Microservices
job_description:
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just documenting requirements; we are bridging the gap between complex financial operations and high-performance technical architecture. We are looking for a Business Analyst who understands the mechanics of banking, thinks in terms of system flows, and wants to have a direct influence on the design of a real-world, high-traffic digital banking ecosystem.

Analyze & Define: Lead the discovery and documentation of business requirements. Transform complex banking processes into clear Use Cases, User Stories, and BPMN 2.0 flows.
Design Solutions: Define business-logic solutions for integrated services, including domestic/international payments, money transfers, and Open Banking interfaces.
Architectural Collaboration: Partner closely with Architects and Engineers to map business logic to technical solutions (API contracts, data flows and sequence diagrams).
Quality & Deployment: Own the requirement lifecycle. Support UAT execution, review test cases, and ensure the final delivery aligns with both business needs and legal/regulatory standards.
Bridge the Gap: Act as the primary translator between business stakeholders and technical squads, ensuring clarity, consistency, and alignment across all project phases.
requirement:
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.

1. Analytical Rigor & Process Design
Process Mastery: Deep experience in mapping complex banking workflows. You are proficient in visualizing processes using BPMN and sequence diagrams.
Documentation Excellence: Proven ability to produce clear, structured documentation (Solution Specs, User Stories, API Contracts). You prioritize clarity and "testability" in your requirements.
Problem Decomposition: Ability to break down complex financial problems (e.g., cross-border settlement, payment orchestration) into manageable, technically feasible requirements.
2. Banking & Integration Domain
Payment Domain Knowledge: Deep understanding of domestic payment schemes (Napas 247, QR Code, ECOM) and international payment standards.
API Fluency: Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, OpenAPI 3.0 specifications, and API-Led connectivity. You can read technical API documentation and participate in designing API contracts.
Integration Mindset: Experience navigating the complexities of Core Banking systems, Payment Hubs, and third-party payment gateways.
3. Workflow & Collaboration
Lifecycle Management: Proficiency with Jira/Redmine to track requirements, manage Change Requests (CR), and coordinate with development/QA teams throughout the SDLC.
Communication: Exceptional ability to present complex technical concepts to non-technical business users, and conversely, represent business needs to engineering teams.
4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills
Technical Leadership: Ability to drive architectural discussions, challenge legacy assumptions, and mentor junior team members.
Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to keep pace with evolving fintech trends (e.g., Open Banking, AI-driven financial services).
AI-SDLC: Experience leveraging AI tools (e.g., for automated documentation, test case generation, or requirement analysis) in daily workflows.
5. Core Competencies & Professional Background
Experience: 5+ years of professional experience as a Business Analyst in the Finance/Banking sector.
Educational Foundation: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or Finance/Banking. Technical Literacy: Understanding of Microservices architecture and how business requirements impact system design and performance.
Regulatory Compliance: Ability to ensure that all proposed technical solutions remain strictly within the bounds of legal and banking regulations.
Bonus points for:
Direct experience in Open Banking, API Gateway, or Payment Hub project implementations.
Experience in designing systems for high-traffic, real-time transaction environments.
Practical knowledge of software testing methodologies and UAT management tools.

location: 9th Floor, Viettel Tower, 285 Cach Mang Thang 8, Hoa Hung, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Cloud, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, Python
job_description:
1. Cloud Infrastructure Engineering (IaC)
Design, provision, and maintain Azure and Google Cloud infrastructure using
Terraform
(modules, state management, automated pipelines).
Build reusable Terraform modules for networking, compute, IAM, GKE/AKS, databases, firewalls, storage, etc.
Implement cloud governance policies such as naming conventions, tagging, RBAC, and cost controls.
2. Cloud Operations
Manage and operate cloud resources:
Perform day‑to‑day operations: VM patching, disk management, backup monitoring, network rule updates, identity/RBAC controls.
Monitor and tune performance for cloud clusters.
Manage Backup, Site Recovery, snapshots, and disaster recovery drills.
Handle operational tasks for PaaS workloads (App Service, Functions, SQL Database).
3. Automation & CI/CD
Automated provisioning pipelines using Terraform integrated with Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI.
Automate OS-level tasks using Bash, PowerShell, Python, or Ansible.
4. OS & Platform Troubleshooting
Troubleshoot OS-level issues across Linux and Windows instances.
Analyze logs, investigate network connectivity problems, and perform root-cause analysis.
Optimize VM and container performance in cloud environments.
5. Monitoring, Logging & Performance Optimization
Implement observability using Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Splunk, Azure Monitor, and GCP Cloud Monitoring.
Define and tune alerts for SLO/SLI/SLA compliance.
Perform performance profiling, system tuning, and capacity planning.
6. Security, Governance & Compliance
Apply cloud security best practices (IAM, network segmentation, key management, policies).
Implement Azure Policy, GCP Organizational Policies, etc.
Conduct security patching, vulnerability remediation, and compliance checks.
7. Documentation & Knowledge Sharing
Maintain operational SOPs.
Share cloud engineering best practices with development and operations teams.
requirement:
Experience
3–5 years of hands‑on Cloud Engineering & Operations experience in Azure and/or GCP.
Hand-Ons experience with Terraform for production workloads.
Excellence in English is mandatory. Must be able to handle client communications and technical reporting professionally.
Technical Skills
Experience with Azure and/or GCP operational tasks and services.
IaC (Terraform) experience: modules, state mgmt, automation, pipelines.
Linux/Windows system administration.
Docker & Kubernetes (AKS/GKE).

Thiết kế, phát triển và tối ưu các mô hình Machine Learning/Deep Learning nhằm giải quyết các bài toán kinh doanh phức tạp, gắn chặt với KPI và định hướng chiến lược

2. Khai thác Insight Dữ liệu (Data Insighting)
Bạn sẽ biến dữ liệu thành tài sản chiến lược, giúp tổ chức ra quyết định thông minh hơn:
Khai thác các insight có giá trị cao từ các tập dữ liệu lớn, đa dạng, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh
Xây dựng framework giám sát mô hình, theo dõi hiệu năng và cải thiện độ chính xác liên tục

2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:
i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.
ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):
• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)

iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.
iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.
v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.
vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.

OTANICS provides comprehensive IoT-based solutions for aquaculture that combine sensors and data science with state-of-the-art computer vision and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies. Our solutions provide supporting tools for shrimp farmers with insightful recommendations to make better, well-informed decisions, lower costs, and significantly increase yields as we strive toward a more sustainable aquaculture. Backed by top multinational corporations, we offer a large customer base and a work environment that prioritizes professional growth and performance.
The Job Overview
We are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to provide technical leadership within our growing team. You will collaborate with a diverse group of software engineers, data scientists, and ML experts to architect and deploy advanced models that solve real-world aquaculture challenges. As a senior member of the team, you are expected to stay at the forefront of AI developments, mentoring junior engineers while driving the technical direction of our perception and prediction pipelines.

Drive the research and development of advanced AI models for specialized shrimp farming and processing applications.

Oversee the design and execution of complex data collection and labeling strategies.
Architect and convert AI/ML models into robust, scalable APIs for seamless integration by other development teams.
Perform sophisticated statistical analysis on massive, multi-modal datasets to extract actionable insights.
Manage the end-to-end project infrastructure and the full lifecycle of AI model development.
Mentor and work alongside machine learning and data engineers to build production-grade models.
requirement:
Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.
Proficiency in C/C++/Python and strong foundation in data structures and algorithms.
In-depth, hands-on knowledge of deep learning fundamentals.
Hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks (e.g. PyTorch, TensorFlow).
Deep familiarity with modern deep learning architectures (e.g., Transformers, CNNs).
Experience deploying ML models into production pipelines with monitoring, validation, and iteration loops.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders.

requirement:

•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."

•    DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices.
•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.

•    Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions.
•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.
•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.

5.1 Android Developer

•    Architectural Mindset: Strong experience with MVVM, Clean Architecture, and Modularization. You should know how to build apps that are easy to test and maintain.
•    Modern Tools: Proficiency with Coroutines and Flow.
•    Quality Focused: You understand SOLID principles and aren’t afraid to refactor to improve code health.
•    Communication: Ability to work well in a team and explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
Bonus points for:
•    Hands-on experience with Jetpack Compose.
•    Experience in the Fintech/Banking domain or exposure to platforms like Backbase.
•    Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
•    Experience integrating advanced features like OCR/eKYC or AI-driven chatbots.

Bonus points for:

•     Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
•    Experience integrating advanced features like OCR/eKYC or AI-driven chatbots.

job_description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE
We are looking for a Senior Product Designer to take full ownership of the end-to-end design process for complex, multi-flow digital products. In this role, you will lead the entire design lifecycle, bringing a sophisticated lens to UX Research and Strategic Ideation to solve our most intricate product challenges.
You will be responsible for discovering business challenges, analyzing user insights, and proposing strategic solution directions. By collaborating directly with Business Owners, Analysts, and Engineers, you will shape product concepts from initial discovery through to high-fidelity execution, ensuring every design decision is backed by evidence and logical rigor.
Why Join Us?
Full-Flow Ownership: Lead the design journey from ambiguous problem spaces to polished, high-fidelity solutions.
Strategic Influence: Work as a key partner to Business Owners and decision-makers to shape the product roadmap.
High-Complexity Challenges: Tackle products with intricate business logic and multi-user workflows that require high-level structural thinking.
Evidence-Based Culture: Work in an environment that values deep research-driven design and rationalized solution framing.
JOB DESCRIPTION
UX Research & Discovery
End-to-End Research: Lead research across discovery, definition, and validation using qualitative and quantitative methods (interviews, field studies, surveys, usability tests, and data analysis).
Synthesis & Frameworks: Transform raw findings into actionable strategic tools: Personas, JTBD, User Journeys, Service Blueprints, and Opportunity Maps.
Business Alignment: Partner with stakeholders to align user insights with business goals, technical constraints, and operational logic.
Ideation & Solution Framing
Conceptual Direction: Drive the ideation of multiple solution directions, evaluating trade-offs based on user insights, business feasibility, and scalability.
Logic & Flow Architecture: Structure intricate interaction logic and system behaviors, ensuring all flows are consistent and well-rationalized.
Rapid Validation: Build and test prototypes to quickly validate hypotheses and refine product directions during the early stages of design.
Design Execution & Collaboration
High-Fidelity Delivery: Own the final UI/UX execution, ensuring high-quality wireframes and designs that are ready for technical hand-off.
Cross-Functional Synergy: Partner closely with Engineers and Analysts to align on scope, technical feasibility, and system workflows (API logic, operational rules, etc.).
Effective Communication: Present research outcomes and strategic directions directly to Business Owners and decision-making stakeholders.
requirement:
Must Have:
5+ years of experience as a Product Designer with a proven track record in full-flow design and a strong expertise in UX Research & Ideation.
Analytical Thinking: Exceptional ability to structure "messy" problem spaces using both qualitative and quantitative evidence.
Complex Problem Solving: Solid experience in developing and evaluating multiple solution directions for high-complexity or multi-user systems.
Technical Savvy: Proficiency in modern design tools (Figma, etc.) and a strong understanding of Design Systems to ensure feasibility.
Communication & Facilitation: Excellent skills in presenting to stakeholders and handling ambiguity in business requirements with a logical, evidence-based approach.
Ownership: A reliable professional capable of taking full ownership of the product design cycle with high autonomy.
Nice to Have:
Experience working in product design consulting or agency environments.
Familiarity with enterprise platforms, SaaS, or systems with heavy business logic.
A portfolio that highlights the transition from deep research insights to final, polished design solutions.

Crossian is a high-growth, technology-driven e-commerce business. Behind our success is our people. Work closely with PMs, Developers, and Analysts across the product lifecycle: discovery, delivery, iteration.
Join agile rituals and present your work clearly in design reviews and product discussions.

location: Tầng 11, Toà Nhà Robot, 308 - 308C, Điện Biên Phủ, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Python, NodeJS, Kubernetes, AI, Database, TypeScript
job_description:
Why this role is different
Most engineering jobs ask you to maintain legacy systems or add features to crowded codebases. This isn't that.
You'll be one of the founding engineers shaping two products that sit at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, and infrastructure — at a moment when those three things are being rewritten from scratch. The code you write in your first six months will still be running in production five years from now. The architectural decisions you make will shape how thousands of Korean small businesses experience AI, and how GPU compute is delivered across Southeast Asia.
We don't believe in 200-person engineering orgs where you ship one feature per quarter. We believe in small teams of strong engineers who own entire systems end-to-end, ship fast, and use AI tools to operate like teams 5x their size.
The two products you'll build
CoSAP — AI-Powered Business Intelligence for Korean SMEs
Korean small and medium businesses run on Douzone and ECount — ERP systems that hold decades of accounting and operational data, but expose it through forms and reports built for accountants, not founders. CoSAP changes that. We let business owners ask questions in plain Korean — "왜 이번 달 마진이 떨어졌어?" (why did our margin drop this month?) — and get answers backed by their actual financial data.
Under the hood: a multi-tenant data layer connecting Douzone and ECount, retrieval over financial and operational data using PostgreSQL with pgvector and Qdrant, event streaming with Kafka, workflow orchestration with Kestra, and self-hosted LLM serving with vLLM. The Korean SME market is 7+ million businesses. Almost none of them have access to real business intelligence today.
Fusionflow — GPU & AI Infrastructure Orchestration
GPUs are the most expensive, most contested compute resource on earth right now. We operate Kubernetes-based GPU clusters across multiple data centers and turn them into reliable, multi-tenant compute that customers can actually use. Fusionflow is the orchestration layer: scheduling, isolation, observability, and operations.
You'll work on real distributed systems problems — GPU scheduling under contention, node health and failure recovery, network performance tuning across InfiniBand and RoCE, tenant isolation, and the operational tooling needed to run hundreds of GPUs reliably. We currently operate a 19-node K3s cluster with 160+ GPUs and are scaling significantly through 2026.
What you'll actually do
Concretely — not buzzwords, but the kind of tickets you'll close in your first year:
Build the next-generation ERP connector layer
for CoSAP — designing schemas, sync logic, and conflict resolution for ECount and Douzone data flowing into our analytics layer.
Improve retrieval quality
for natural-language financial queries — chunking strategies, embedding models, hybrid search, and evaluation pipelines.
Design and operate Fusionflow's GPU scheduling logic
— how do we fairly allocate scarce GPU resources across tenants while keeping latency low?
Harden cluster operations
— node health monitoring, automated remediation, network tuning, DDoS mitigation, observability.
Write production-grade APIs and internal tooling
in Python and TypeScript that other engineers, ops staff, and customers depend on.
Review AI-generated code with the same rigor as human code
— catching subtle bugs, hallucinated APIs, security issues, and performance regressions.
Be on-call
for systems you build. Debug real outages. Write the postmortem. Ship the fix.
requirement:
In the AI era, raw coding skill is no longer the bottleneck. Almost anyone can produce working code with Claude Code or Cursor. What separates strong engineers from average ones now is judgment, taste, and verification discipline. Here's what we actually screen for, in priority order:
1. Verification instinct — the ability to spot when AI output is wrong
This is the #1 filter. AI tools produce confident, plausible-looking code that is sometimes subtly broken — hallucinated APIs, wrong async behavior, race conditions, security holes, schema mismatches. The best engineers today treat AI output as a draft from a fast, overconfident junior, not as truth. We will test this in the interview.
2. Strong fundamentals in distributed systems
You understand consistency, idempotency, retries, queues, timeouts, and what happens when networks partition. You've worked with Kubernetes, Kafka (or equivalent), and PostgreSQL in production — not just in tutorials. You know why SELECT FOR UPDATE exists and when to use it.
3. Problem decomposition over prompt engineering
Given an ambiguous request, you ask the right clarifying questions before writing code. You can break "sync ECount data into our analytics layer" into a concrete technical plan covering schema, ingestion, idempotency, error handling, and observability — before opening Claude Code.
4. Production ownership and operational maturity
You've been on-call. You've debugged a real outage at 2 AM. You read logs, traces, and metrics fluently. You write code defensively because you've been burned. You don't say "works on my machine" — you say "let me check what differs in production."
5. Code reading > code writing
Most of your time is spent reading and reviewing, not greenfield writing. You can drop into an unfamiliar codebase, orient yourself in a few hours, and identify what to change. You're comfortable navigating large repos, reading other people's code, and understanding intent.
6. AI tool fluency with healthy skepticism
Daily use of Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot. Familiarity with MCP, agent workflows, tool calling, and prompt design. Most importantly: you know where these tools fail and you compensate. A candidate who blindly trusts AI output is more dangerous than one who doesn't use it at all.
7. Clear written communication in English
PR descriptions, technical specs, runbooks, prompt design, async messaging with a globally distributed team. Clear writing equals clear thinking. We work asynchronously across Singapore, HCMC, and Korea — written communication is the medium.
The stack you'll work with
Languages:  Python, TypeScript / Node.js (some Go for infrastructure)
Data: PostgreSQL, pgvector, Qdrant, Kafka, Kestra
AI / ML:  vLLM, sentence-transformers, embedding models, RAG pipelines
Infrastructure: Kubernetes (K3s), Docker, Linux, GPU operators
Networking: InfiniBand, RoCE, DWDM (you'll learn what you don't know)
AI Tooling: Claude Code, Cursor, MCP servers, custom agent workflows
Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging
Source / CI" Git, GitHub Actions, code review culture
Nice-to-haves (not required)
Korean language reading ability — significant advantage for CoSAP work
Experience with ERP systems (Douzone, ECount, SAP, Oracle)
GPU/CUDA familiarity, or experience operating Kubernetes with GPU workloads
RAG and vector search tuning experience
Smart contract or blockchain experience (we have adjacent projects in tokenized infrastructure)
Open-source contributions, technical blog, or side projects we can look at

job_description:
At Money Forward Inc., we are dedicated to transforming financial services through advanced technology. With over 50 services for individuals and businesses—including products such as Money Forward ME and Money Forward Cloud—we help users better understand and manage their finances. Our platform leverages industry-leading account aggregation technology to turn financial data into meaningful insights.
Within the Money Forward Business Segment (MFBS), Money Forward Cloud is a component-based cloud ERP composed of multiple service groups. While this modularity provides flexibility, developing services in isolation can lead to data silos, inconsistent user experiences, and reduced development efficiency.
The Business Platform Development (BPD) division addresses this by building the shared foundations that unify services across the platform. We develop and operate common microservices and backend systems that power workflows and platform functionality throughout Money Forward Cloud. Our mission is to standardize capabilities, reduce technical friction, improve scalability, and enable product teams to move faster with confidence.
We are looking for a senior, execution-oriented engineering leader who combines strong hands-on engineering skills with a high sense of ownership. In this role, you will drive complex backend initiatives end-to-end, contribute code where it has the most impact, and help teams turn ambiguity into clear, executable work. Rather than focusing on ceremonies, you will lead through technical direction, decision-making, and presence—supporting both delivery and the people doing the work while aligning priorities and unblocking execution.
This role offers the opportunity to create outsized impact across Tokyo and Vietnam teams by stabilizing execution, raising engineering standards, and strengthening the reliability of Money Forward’s common platform services.

Take end-to-end ownership of backend initiatives, from problem definition through delivery and follow-up.
Drive execution by turning ambiguous goals into clear, actionable work with defined ownership.
Design, implement, and review scalable backend systems and services, contributing hands-on where it has the highest impact.
Use AI to rapidly transform the requirements into a functional reality.
Ultra-fast prototyping and initial production deployment within a matter of days, leveraging generative AI.
Instantly identifying technical flaws in AI-generated code or UI, and then correcting and improving them.
Identify technical, delivery, and organizational blockers early and push initiatives past them.
Act as a technical and execution anchor for engineers across Tokyo and Vietnam.
Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to raise engineering quality, ownership, and team confidence.
Support planning and delivery by helping teams scope work realistically, surface dependencies, and maintain momentum.
Serve as a key technical contact point between engineering teams, product, and leadership to ensure alignment and visibility.
Improve team processes pragmatically, focusing on outcomes rather than ceremonies.
Support engineers through mentorship, coaching, and timely feedback—helping individuals grow confidence, ownership, and execution capability.
Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement.
requirement:
Practical background in software engineering or a related field (technical institution that enables you to build things on your own). A basic understanding of and familiarity with the B2B business domain.
6+ years of professional software development experience with strong hands-on backend skills.
Proven experience leading technical initiatives without formal authority (e.g., senior IC, staff engineer, or tech lead role).
Strong understanding of backend system design, APIs, data stores, and distributed systems.
Comfortable operating in environments with ambiguity and changing priorities.
Clear communicator who can explain technical decisions, trade-offs, and risks to both engineers and non-engineers.
Strong sense of ownership — drives progress instead of waiting for instructions.
Experience with Go and/or Java in production systems.
Experience with distributed systems, message queues, or event-driven architectures.
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), containerization, and infrastructure as code.
Experience working with multi-national, cross-timezone teams.
Pragmatic exposure to architecture patterns (DDD, clean architecture, etc.) without dogmatism.
Business level English proficiency (TOEIC score of 700 or above equivalent).
Japanese proficiency is not required, but a plus.
Engineers who naturally take ownership when something has no clear owner.
People who enjoy turning messy problems into executable plans.
Senior ICs who prefer impact and responsibility over titles.
Engineers who respect process but are not blocked by it.
Leaders who create stability and trust through clarity, calm judgment, and follow-through.
Those aligned with Money Forward’s Mission, Vision, and Values, and motivated to build durable platform foundations.

job_description:
BE A MAKER
At Simpson Strong-Tie, we've built a workplace where people are connected and engaged in creative thinking from day one throughout their careers.
When you think of the best a family has to offer - support, collaboration and respect - that's what we value at Simpson Strong-Tie. When there's a win, we'll cheer you on. When there's a snag, coworkers step in to help you out. Working on solutions together is just the way we do things here, and that creates an atmosphere that often feels like home.
At Simpson Strong-Tie, you'll find talented, passionate, dedicated, humble and genuinely kind people who are all connected by our shared mission - to provide solutions that help people design and build safer, stronger structures.
It's this mission and our strong people-focused values that have made Simpson Strong-Tie a unique place to work for more than 70 years - a place where you can connect, create and build your career. We invite you to  about our culture and why our employees are our most loyal customers.

YOU
You will
serve as a primary technical authority, providing both leadership and architectural expertise for Simpson’s application services and enterprise solutions. You will collaborate closely with the US Technical Leads, Development Manager and key stakeholders to propose and execute innovative technical strategies that align with organizational goals and maximize customer satisfaction.

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING
Service Providing Management
The successful candidate will provide subject matter expertise in .NET to lead the development of high-performance engines and scalable web applications. The candidate will oversee the robustness of .NET backend integrations and ensure the stability of cross-platform services.
Lead the design, development, and maintenance of Residential .NET applications, ensuring they meet business requirements and performance standards. Apply deep knowledge of Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to manage the complexity of the residential web applications.
Define, communicate, and enforce software development best practices, emphasizing the practical application of design patterns to optimize performance and scalability.
Lead the team in migrating legacy .NET and monolithic applications to scalable,
microservices-based architectures
using
Azure
and cloud-native platforms.
Drive a culture of testing excellence using practically the
unit test, integration test
, maintaining a strictly enforced
Code Coverage threshold of >80%
.
Standardize cloud resource provisioning such as
Terraform,
facilitate fully automated CI/CD lifecycles.
Practical experience with the deployment of containerized applications using
Azure Container Apps
.
Implement comprehensive monitoring strategies using
Azure Monitor
and/or
Application Insights
to establish real-time alerting and system health dashboards.
Serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) to resolve complex technical challenges and support the team in troubleshooting advanced issues.
People Development
Strategic Upskilling:
Align subordinate technical training with corporate growth objectives to ensure the team’s professional competencies meet evolving project requirements.
Performance Excellence:
Partner with the Senior Manager to define evaluation criteria and feedback loops that drive employee engagement and peak performance.
Knowledge Leadership:
Champion a culture of continuous learning and cross-functional knowledge sharing across the segment. Design technical interview frameworks and training programs to recruit, coach, and evaluate high-performing on-site teams.

Others
Highly contribute to the Developments and Business Objectives of Segment and Company level.
requirement:
Education
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Certification
TOEIC 800 or Equivalent
Experience
Minimum 7 years of professional software development experience, including 3+ years in a Technical Lead or Solution Architect capacity.
Personal qualities
Integrity, responsibility, commitment, flexibility, innovation
Skills & Abilities

job_description:
About Everfit
At Everfit, we're on a mission to build the future of personalized fitness. We connect coaches and clients seamlessly through a global wellness marketplace where anyone can find the perfect coach - regardless of budget, goals or location. With nearly 280,000 coaches in 200+ countries, our platform supports not only personal trainers, but Olympic athletes, military trainers, celebrity coaches, cancer rehab specialists, and everyday heroes transforming lives through fitness. We're not just helping people get stronger—we're helping coaches build thriving businesses that make a real impact.
From workouts and nutrition to habit coaching, payments, and client communication, Everfit brings it all together with a powerful layer of automation to help coaches scale their impact and grow their business. We're integrating next-gen AI sidekicks - smart assistants that help coaches program and unlock deep health insights in real time. Imagine if Jarvis from Iron Man doubled as your personal fitness strategist!

Position Overview:
We are looking for a Tech Lead to anchor the technical direction of Everfit's Core squad, the most used, most business-critical part of our platform.

This is primarily a technical leadership role. Roughly 80% of your time will be on technical direction, architecture decisions, system design, code reviews, and mentoring engineers across Core's sub-squads. Around 20% will be hands-on coding, focused on the most complex and highest-stakes parts of the system.

What makes this role unique is breadth. Core's teams span backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps, and you'll need to provide meaningful technical oversight across all of them. You don't need to be an expert in every discipline, but you should be fluent enough to guide architecture decisions, challenge technical trade-offs, and earn the trust of engineers regardless of their stack. Your primary depth is backend — that's where the hardest system design problems live. But your awareness of how mobile, frontend, and DevOps connect to the backend is what makes you effective as the technical anchor for Core.

We operate with an AI-first engineering mindset. You'll champion AI tools across the squad, helping engineers move faster, write better code, and ship with more confidence. We're also building AI features into the Core product itself, so you'll help shape how AI integrates with the coaching workflows coaches rely on every day.

Your impact
Technical Direction & Architecture
Own the architectural patterns and technical standards for Core's backend systems — workout programming engines, scheduling logic, nutrition tracking, multi-tenant platform infrastructure, notification pipelines, and third-party integrations.
Drive solution design for complex features: new product areas, cross-squad integrations, platform-level changes, and performance-critical systems.
Make architectural decisions that balance delivery velocity with long-term maintainability — Core is a high-frequency product and tech debt accumulates fast.
Define and uphold engineering standards across all six Core sub-squads: API design, data modeling, testing practices, code review culture, and documentation.
Proactively identify and lead reduction of technical debt in coordination with Engineering Management and Product.
Hands-on Engineering (~20%)
Stay in the code on the most critical work — core platform infrastructure, high-risk migrations, cross-squad technical foundations, and architectural proof-of-concepts.
Review pull requests across sub-squads with depth and speed, giving feedback that helps engineers grow — not just ships.
Set the standard for what good code looks like across Core: observable, testable, maintainable, and scalable.
AI-First Engineering
Champion AI-assisted development across all Core sub-squads — from code generation and test writing to automated documentation and PR reviews.
Collaborate with the AI squad on integrating AI features directly into Core workflows: smart programming suggestions, automated progress summaries, AI-powered onboarding.
Help engineers build practical AI fluency through pairing, demos, and shared tooling workflows.
Mentorship & Team Growth
Mentor and coach engineers across Core sub-squads — raising the technical bar through code reviews, architectural guidance, and technical pairing.
Run regular technical discussions and design reviews that help engineers grow as system thinkers, not just feature builders.
Contribute to hiring across Core: design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to the Core domain.
Cross-functional Collaboration
Be the primary technical voice in product discovery across Core — shaping what's feasible, what's scalable, and what will cause pain six months from now.
Partner closely with Core PMs, BAs, QA Lead, and Design to ensure technical decisions translate cleanly into user-facing product quality.
Align with Tech Leads in other squads (Marketplace, Payment, AI) on shared infrastructure, platform standards, and cross-squad integrations.
Represent Core Engineering in cross-functional leadership discussions, communicating system decisions with clarity to non-technical stakeholders.
requirement:
Must-Have
5+ years of software engineering experience with a strong backend foundation, plus 2+ years in a Tech Lead, Senior Lead, or equivalent technical leadership role.
Deep backend expertise: system architecture, API design, data modeling, async and event-driven processing, performance optimization, and distributed systems.
Solid understanding of frontend engineering (React or similar) — enough to review architecture decisions, guide performance trade-offs, and provide meaningful technical direction to FE engineers.
Solid understanding of mobile engineering (iOS or cross-platform) — enough to assess architectural quality, review technical decisions, and collaborate effectively with mobile engineers.
Comfortable with DevOps fundamentals — CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred), and deployment practices — so you can oversee and guide the full delivery lifecycle.
Experience building or scaling complex SaaS products with multiple feature areas — ideally platforms with high user frequency and diverse product surfaces (scheduling, tracking, integrations, notifications).
Proven ability to set and uphold engineering standards across a cross-discipline team — not just within a single stack.
Excellent English communication skills — able to lead technical discussions, write clear architectural decisions, and align non-technical stakeholders on trade-offs.
High ownership mindset: you take problems end-to-end, proactively surface risks, and drive them to resolution.
AI-first engineering mindset: you actively use AI tools to work smarter and help your team do the same.
Nice to Have
Hands-on production experience across multiple disciplines — shipped both backend and mobile or frontend features in the same product.
Familiarity with our stack: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, React.js, iOS (Swift) — or equivalent experience with comparable technologies.
Experience building domain-specific engines: scheduling systems, rule engines, workflow automation, or data-heavy tracking features.
Background in fitness tech, health tech, coaching tools, or any high-frequency B2B SaaS product.
Experience working with distributed engineering teams across Vietnam, US, or UK time zones.
Hands-on exposure to AI feature integration — LLM-powered suggestions, AI-assisted workflows, or personalization systems.

required_skills: System Architecture, Project Management, Machine Learning, AI, ERP, CRM
job_description:
Xây dựng Hệ sinh thái Dữ liệu Khách hàng: Thiết kế và quản lý hệ thống CRM/CDP tập trung cho toàn tập đoàn, đảm bảo dữ liệu khách hàng được kết nối thông suốt giữa các công ty con (BĐS, F&B, Dịch vụ...).
Ứng dụng AI vào Kinh doanh: Nghiên cứu và triển khai các giải pháp AI (Chatbot thông minh, Predictive Analytics - Phân tích dự báo hành vi mua hàng, Recommendation System) để hỗ trợ đội ngũ kinh doanh chốt sale hiệu quả hơn.
Số hóa quy trình Quản trị: Tối ưu hóa các nền tảng công nghệ hiện có (như 1Office, ERP...) và đề xuất các giải pháp phần mềm mới giúp tinh gọn bộ máy vận hành.
Tham mưu chiến lược: Phân tích xu hướng công nghệ mới và tham mưu cho Ban lãnh đạo các giải pháp công nghệ giúp tối ưu chi phí vận hành và tăng trải nghiệm khách hàng (Customer Journey).
Quản lý dự án: Trực tiếp điều phối các dự án triển khai công nghệ, làm việc với các đối tác/nhà thầu phần mềm và quản lý đội ngũ nhân sự kỹ thuật nội bộ.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc các chuyên ngành tương đương.
Tối thiểu 5-7 năm vị trí tương đương trong lĩnh vực CNTT/Chuyển đổi số, có kinh nghiệm triển khai các hệ thống lớn cho doanh nghiệp đa ngành lĩnh vực BĐS, công nghệ,..
Am hiểu sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống, CRM, ERP và các nền tảng dữ liệu.
Am hiểu về cấu trúc dữ liệu, kiến trúc hệ thống và có kinh nghiệm thực tiễn trong việc ứng dụng AI/Machine Learning vào quy trình nghiệp vụ.
Có khả năng làm việc chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh (Business Champions) để biến nhu cầu nghiệp vụ thành giải pháp công nghệ hiệu quả.
Kỹ năng quản lý rủi ro (đặc biệt là rủi ro về sự kháng cự thay đổi từ nhân sự và dữ liệu phân tán).
Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm triển khai các dự án chuyển đổi số (Digital Transformation).

job_title: UX Specialist (Figma, Adobe XD, A/B Testing)
location: 112 Lý Chính Thắng, Phường Xuân Hòa, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: UI-UX, Data Analysis, User Journey Mapping, Adobe XD, Figma, A/B testing
job_description:
Job Summary
The
UX Specialist
is a data-driven advocate for the user, responsible for uncovering deep insights into user behavior and translating them into actionable feedback for the development team. Unlike a generalist designer, this role focuses heavily on
User Research, Usability Testing, and UX Auditing
. You will be the "guardian of quality," ensuring that every feature developed is intuitive, accessible, and solves real user problems.
Position
: team member or team lead
Open level
: from Middle to Senior level
Work location (select 1 of 2 options below):
In Vietnam: HoChiMinh city, central districts
Onsite in Dubai: extremely high benefits, all living costs covered by allowance (accommodation, meals on working days,  transportation)
Working hour
:
9:00 - 18:00 (or flexible to 8:00 - 17:00 depending on policy at the moment)
Monday to Friday
Key Responsibilities
User Research & Discovery:
Plan and conduct qualitative and quantitative research (User interviews, surveys, card sorting, and field studies) to understand user needs and pain points.
Usability Testing:
Lead end-to-end usability testing sessions on prototypes and live products to identify friction points.
UX Auditing & Heuristic Evaluation
: Regularly perform expert reviews of current UI/UX designs to ensure compliance with design principles and accessibility standards (WCAG).
Feedback & Documentation:
Synthesize complex research data into clear, actionable reports. Provide specific, constructive feedback to UI Designers and Developers.
User Journey Mapping
: Create and maintain User Journey Maps, Service Blueprints, and User Flows to visualize the end-to-end experience.
Competitive Analysis
: Monitor industry trends and competitor products to identify opportunities for innovation and improvement.
Validation:
Review implemented features during the UAT (User Acceptance Testing) phase to ensure they meet the defined UX requirements.
requirement:
Requirements & Qualifications
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Psychology, Computer Science, Design, or a related field.
Experience:
3+ years of experience in UX Research, UX Design, or Product Analysis.
● Portfolio:
A strong portfolio demonstrating your research process, case studies of how your feedback improved a product, and your ability to analyze complex flows.
●
Technical Proficiency:
* Proficiency in design tools like
Figma or Adobe XD
(for wireframing and prototyping).
Experience with research/analytics tools (e.g.,
Hotjar, Mixpanel,Maze, Google Analytics, Usertesting.com
).
Key Skills (Technical)
Research Methodology
: Mastery of various research methods (A/B testing, ethnography, longitudinal studies).
Data Analysis:
Ability to interpret both qualitative feedback (what users say) and quantitative data (what users do).
Information Architecture
: Understanding how to organize content and navigation to be most effective for users.
Prototyping:
Ability to create low-to-mid fidelity wireframes to communicate structural changes quickly.
[optional] Coding (or vibe coding):
Know how to implement an web or mobile application
Soft Skills
Empathy:
The ability to put yourself in the user's shoes and represent their voice within the company.
Communication & Persuasion:
Strong storytelling skills to present findings to stakeholders and the ability to negotiate with Developers/Product Managers.
Critical Thinking
: A sharp eye for detail and the ability to spot logical flaws in a user flow before they reach production.
Constructive Radical Candor:
The ability to give direct, honest feedback to the development team while maintaining a collaborative and positive relationship.
Adaptability:
Comfortable working in an Agile/Scrum environment where priorities can shift quickly.

- Thiết kế các phương án dự phòng hệ thống.
- Thiết kế các phương án sao lưu, khôi phục, xử lý lỗi.
- Thiết kế ATTT hệ thống
Nghiên cứu và thử nghiệm công nghệ
- Rà soát, đánh giá đưa ra các đề xuất cải tiến, tối ưu cho  sản phẩm
- Xác định chiến lược đầu tư công nghệ để hỗ trợ phát triển kiến trúc sản phẩm và tối đa hoá lợi tức đầu tư công nghệ
- Thử nghiệm công nghệ mới, báo cáo và đưa vào định hướng công nghệ trong tương lai
Là người rà soát cuối cùng về giải pháp kỹ thuật của dự án
requirement:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chính quy loại Khá trở lên chuyên ngành CNTT/ĐTVT và các chuyên ngành Kỹ thuật liên quan và Kinh tế
- Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc tại vị trí tương đương.
- Nắm rõ các kiến trúc hệ thống cơ bản thường dùng và các giải pháp khả thi để tích hợp, giao tiếp với các hệ thống bên ngoài, đánh giá được ưu nhược điểm của từng phương pháp, các công nghệ về webservice (SOAP, WSDL, JAXR, …)
- Có kiến thức về giải pháp ATTT cho các thành phần trong kiến trúc hệ thống
- Có kiến thức, hiểu biết về design patterns, lựa chọn phù hợp cho các trường hợp và vấn đề thường gặp khi thiêt kế phần mềm.
- Hiểu biết các dạng kiến trúc cơ bản như Client Tier (SPA, HTML, AJAX, …), Web Tier (MVC, JSP, JFS, Templating framework, webframework), Business Tier (EJB, JPA, ESB)
- Có nền tảng về phần cứng và phần mềm. Giao tiếp và diễn đạt vấn đề kĩ thuật tốt.
- Có kiến thức am hiểu về nghiệp vụ ngành/lĩnh vực được giao và hiểu biết về các xu thế công nghệ mới trên thế giới
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Anh. Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ TOEIC, TOEFL hoặc IELTS tương đương với điểm TOEIC – 650 điểm trở lên.

location: Toà nhà Viettel, số 1 Trần Hữu Dực, Từ Liêm, Hà Nội, Tu Liem, Ha Noi
required_skills: Java, CI/CD, Angular, Database, Flutter, JavaScript
job_description:
Thiết kế
kiến trúc tổng thể hệ thống
(database, API, microservices, distributed system…) đảm bảo tính mở rộng, ổn định, bảo mật và khả năng chịu tải cao.
Dẫn dắt team phát triển từ front-end đến back-end, định hướng công nghệ, xây dựng coding standard và kiểm soát chất lượng code.
Chủ trì review design, code, đảm bảo tuân thủ các nguyên tắc clean architecture, design pattern và best practices.
Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, đề xuất giải pháp kỹ thuật tối ưu, đảm bảo cân bằng giữa hiệu năng, chi phí và khả năng mở rộng.
Giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp: performance bottleneck, concurrency, distributed transaction, system failure…
Thiết kế và tối ưu hệ thống CI/CD, container (Docker, Kubernetes), đảm bảo quy trình phát triển và triển khai hiệu quả.
Đào tạo, mentoring đội ngũ kỹ sư, nâng cao năng lực kỹ thuật cho team.
Phối hợp với các bên liên quan (PM, BA, QA) để đảm bảo tiến độ và chất lượng sản phẩm.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học (loại Khá trở lên) chuyên ngành CNTT, Điện tử Viễn thông, Khoa học Máy tính, Toán Tin Ứng dụng hoặc tương đương.
Ngoại ngữ: Đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Anh ngon lành. Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ TOEIC 650+ (hoặc IELTS, TOEFL tương đương).
Có
5–8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm
Có
ít nhất 2–3 năm ở vị trí Senior / Tech Lead
Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team từ 3–10 người
Nền tảng lập trình:
Thành thạo ít nhất một ngôn ngữ: Java / C# / JavaScript / Kotlin / Swift. Hiểu sâu:
OOP, SOLID
Design pattern
Clean code / clean architecture
Kiến thức công nghệ: Thiết kế hệ thống: Microservices, distributed systems, API design (REST, event-driven). Database: SQL, NoSQL,Transaction, indexing, optimization. Performance:Caching (Redis), Queue (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
Concurrency & multithreading nâng cao
Phân tích log và xử lý sự cố hệ thống
